Description question: does it briefly describe contents of each section. It briefly describes the three introduction parts, but not the thesis sections. The question likely about thesis sections, not introduction parts. So not meeting. So compliance false.

Structure question: can it be easily understood general structure of thesis from text? It only gives introduction parts, not overall structure. So not. So compliance false.

Thus all false. Provide feedback accordingly.
